title: Laf's Wacky Update
description: A comedic mod made for laf's "I Made a Minecraft Update That Shouldn't Exist" video. With unique features, both good and bad, mainly bad.
body: ![Laf's Wacky Update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97d1a62fe76af1c065fb856f5d262fd43b9e586a.png) Minecraft has a very specific set of requirements they must follow when deciding what to include in a Minecraft Update. This mod does everything in its power to break those traditional Minecraft Update Requirements. ### Too many bush variants: - Sawblade Bush: Harmful bush that can damage your character. - `/damaged-body reset ` to restore your model. - Copper Bush: Electricity attracting bush that attracks all lightning, whenever, whereever. - Flyfire Bush: Ignited havoc. - George Bush: Just a bush named george. - Clockwork Bush: Slows nearby entities to 30% speed. - Ironthorn Bush: Magnetizes all iron related items or entities. ### Crossbow Ammo Crossbows can now be loaded with *anything*, and I mean anything. Eggs, snowballs, iron blocks, sticks, creepers, boats, wind charges, minecarts, wardens, swords, axes. The list. goes. on. ### Iron Replacement Due to the replacement of Netherrite Ingots in the new Loadstone crafting recipe, we've gone ahead and removed every last bit of Netherrite in the world. But don't worry, we've replaced it with Iron! Explore the world and find yourself some Modern Debris, Leather Golems, Iron Downgrade templates and more! Iron is now the world's most importantly useless resource! ### Static Electricity Ever feel like carpets are too comfortable in Minecraft? Not anymore! Carpets can now create static charge-ups, which you can use to attack entities.
